programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La hermana de Morgan ve a una muchacha que se parece a su prima supuestamente muerta. Morgan tiene que confesar a su familia la mentira que él dijo, y el UAC vuelve a abrir el caso.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Mientras investigan el asesinato de un infante de marina, el equipo de NCIS descubre un laberinto de cámaras espías que transmiten en vivo, escondidas en las habitaciones de un motel de Virginia.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS investiga el asesinato de un músico de la banda más elitista de la Armada que actúa en eventos diplomáticos en todo el mundo.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS investiga el asesinato de un suboficial que se transmitió en vivo en una popular aplicación de juegos. Además, Gibbs cuidará a su vecino de 11 años, Phineas (Jack Fisher), porque su madre debe irse en un viaje de última hora.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs y el equipo ayudan a Ziva (Cote de Pablo) con “la única cosa” de la que dijo que tendría que encargarse antes de regresar con su familia.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): A plena vista
programme.desc: Danny y Baez se enfrentan a la tarea de localizar a un traficante de drogas después de que dos jóvenes modelos aparezcan muertas por sobredosis. Además, Eddie y Jamie se unen para determinar quién es el autor intelectual de un robo.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Secretos de familia
programme.desc: Después de obtener una coincidencia de un pariente desconocido de una red de ADN, Sean Reagan investiga para averiguar quién podría ser esta persona misteriosa.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Amidst a shifting political climate, Frank goes head to head with City Council Speaker Regina Thomas (Whoopi Goldberg) over protests against police brutality.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Danny and Jamie combine forces to convict a notorious drug lord, as Erin nervously awaits the Governor's selection for the new District Attorney.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando una mujer en Oregon es encontrada muerta en un asilo, la UAC se da cuenta que la víctima es parte de una serie de asesinatos rituales góticos y que el asesino podría ser satanista.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La hermana de Morgan ve a una muchacha que se parece a su prima supuestamente muerta. Morgan tiene que confesar a su familia la mentira que él dijo, y el UAC vuelve a abrir el caso.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Después de un asesino en serie es ejecutado en Oklahoma, un imitador aparece y los agentes del FBI son llamados para encontrarlo. Al mismo tiempo, Prentiss se pone nerviosa pensando en una importante compra inmobiliaria.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC presenta uno de los casos más longevos de un asesino en serie a unos estudiantes universitarios, y llevan la clase a través de los 20 años en los que persiguieron al asesino.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs y el equipo ayudan a Ziva (Cote de Pablo) con “la única cosa” de la que dijo que tendría que encargarse antes de regresar con su familia.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A wanted felon attempts to outrun the deputies, undercover officers conduct a sting in an area known for prostitution, and a domestic dispute between cousins goes too far.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man with a knife resists as a hotel clerk cheers on Officers. A man protests the legality of a stop but finally admits why he argued with Officers. A passenger becomes emotional when meth is found.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers spot a suspected stolen vehicle and a pursuit ensues. Officers are called to a fight at a bar over a tossed drink. Police are called to the scene of two intoxicated siblings arguing.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The owner of a stolen truck calls officers when he spots it in a nearby alley. A fleeing driver leads officers on a wild chase over a closed bridge. Police track down a suspect who gave a liquor store employee a phony $100 bill.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An open container and crack pipe are discovered inside a teen's vehicle. Officers find a man at a nearby residence lifting weights after trying to evade police. A fight involving two men and a shovel is broken up.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A car pursuit turned foot chase ends with the suspect jumping head first into a creek-bed. Officers catch up to a man trying to flee the scene after assaulting his wife. Officers stop a suspicious vehicle driving with no headlights.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A convenience store sprinter bets officers he'll get away next time, matching bullets help solve an armed robbery, and a trucker takes his family on a supersized car chase.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A cyclist leads officers on a low-speed chase, a motorist who led police on a dangerous chase feigns ignorance, and a couple's date ends with a totaled car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A foot pursuit ends in arrest after a suspected drug dealer attempts to discard his goods. Police are called to a warehouse after the security guard is held at gunpoint. Police assist a young girl after being struck by a car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A driver foot bails from a still-rolling van and hides nearby. A teen on a dirt bike refuses to stop for Deputies. A man attempts to run from a traffic stop but gets hung up on a fence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A generous boyfriend steps in to prevent his girlfriend from going to jail. Officers save a kitten who wants to hide in a dangerous place. A man says he’s been driving a stolen truck for one day, but he’s off by a few months.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A quarreling couple attracts their neighbors' attention, and a disoriented driver blames his freak accident on bad weather.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers go undercover as dealers on a street corner for a drug-reversal sting operation. A man's property is destroyed by his girlfriend's ill-tempered father. An officer spots an intoxicated man assaulting a woman.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect forgets to drive away after breaking into a used car lot. A dispute over money ends in tire slashing. Suspects are found with narcotics and tall tales.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man blames the weed found in his car on his absent nephew, a suspect in custody starts to convulse, and police respond to a call about an armed man tripping on bath salts.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man can’t handle that his van is getting repossessed. An Uncle finds his nephew has been hiding all kinds of secrets. Past lovers find their old wounds have yet to heal.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police arrest a suspect for armed robbery. A six foot alligator is found on a homeowner's back porch. An Officer assists in an undercover sting.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A young woman with warrants tries to avoid jail time, deputies confront a hit-and-run suspect, and a routine traffic stop ends with an arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers step in when a man's erratic behavior sparks concern in a neighborhood, and a wanted suspect is convinced an officer told him to take off on his bicycle.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A runaway biker makes multiple clumsy attempts to slip away from deputies. A shady figure has a curious method of trying to get a drink of water. A young woman starts making unwise choices when her family leaves town.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man gets busted during a drug deal, a cyclist gets confused when an officer finds narcotics in his pants, and officers respond to reports of gunfire.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police deploy Tasers after a suspect tries to flee, a man denies committing a crime in front of detectives, and an officer supervises a chaotic business transaction.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police find a burglary suspect up a tree in a California backyard, a parolee at large attempts to flee officers, and a man with a suspended license blows his second chance.

programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the death of two models at New York City’s hottest fashion show-- where all of the clothes consist of nothing but body paint.

programme.desc: Stella and Mac examine a case in which a man was shot to death as a result of one of New York City’s dangerous water gun wars.

programme.title: CSI: NY

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A patient from a mental hospital, who masquerades as Superman, is found dead in an alleyway The CSIs retrace his steps to restore justice to the city.

programme.title: ¿Por qué nací mujer?
programme.desc: Una familia se reúne para festejar el día de las madres. Ante tantos problemas, una mujer hablará lo que no ha dicho por años. Esposo, hijos y nietos escucharán su cansancio y agobio silenciado por la sumisión y la obediencia impuestas.

programme.title: Romance sobre ruedas

programme.title: Telaraña

programme.title: Jade

programme.title: PAID IN FULL

programme.title: El bufete

programme.desc: Benny es deportado de Estados Unidos a un México desgarrado por la guerra entre cárteles del narcotráfico. Se involucra en el negocio narco y asciende rápidamente, rodeado de dinero, mujeres, violencia y excesos.

programme.title: Ya veremos
programme.desc: Los padres de Santi están divorciados, y él está acostumbrado a vivir con ellos pero por separado. Tras una urgente cirugía para salvar su vista, Santi decide hacer una lista de deseos por cumplir pero con sus padres unidos.

programme.title: A la mala
programme.desc: En esta brillante comedia, una bella actriz perseverante (Aislinn Derbez) es contratada para coquetear y luego abandonar a un apuesto ex productor, pero se termina enamorando de él.

programme.title: Las horas contigo
programme.desc: Eva debe aprender a lidiar con un embarazo no deseado frente a la muerte inminente de su amada abuela y arreglar su relación con su madre separada.

programme.title: Una noche sin luna
programme.desc: Durante la víspera del Año Nuevo, tres personajes solitarios viajan a una pequeña ciudad perdida en el campo uruguayo y, a través de sus caminos, tendrán la oportunidad de cambiar sus destinos.

programme.title: Un amor de película
programme.desc: Bernardo es un productor de cine al borde de la bancarrota que decide convencer erróneamente a un director de cine famoso para que haga una mala película para poder ganar mucho dinero. Laura, su novia y agente, se convierte en su musa y confiada.

programme.title: EL Ojo (2008)
programme.desc: Una chica ciega recibe un trasplante de córnea para poder recuperar la vista. Sin embargo, recibe más de lo que esperaba cuando se da cuenta de que puede ver inquietantes fantasmas.

programme.title: Pulse
programme.desc: Cuando su amigo hacker accidentalmente canaliza una misteriosa señal inalámbrica, un grupo de estudiantes se reúnen para detener a un terrible mal que se apodera del mundo.

programme.title: La maldición
programme.desc: En este thriller apasionante y sobrenatural con las estrellas más populares de Hollywood, un temor del estudio crece hasta convertirse en una vertiginosa pesadilla para un profesor y tres sujetos atrapados en una mansión misteriosa.

programme.title: Avenida Cloverfield 10
programme.desc: Después de un accidente de autos, una mujer despierta en el búnker de un supervivencialista. Él afirma haberla salvado de un ataque apocalíptico, pero al sospechar de sus intenciones, ella deberá escapar para descubrir la verdad.

programme.title: Para Elisa
programme.desc: Tras responder a un anuncio para un trabajo de niñera, Ana descubre que la persona a su cargo, Elisa, es una joven violentamente trastornada de su misma edad. Ana, atrapada en la casa como el nuevo juguete de Elisa, debe luchar para sobrevivir.

programme.title: Caso 39
programme.desc: Renée Zellweger, ganadora de un Oscar, protagoniza la película de suspenso sobrenatural de una trabajadora social, que tiene asignado el raro e inquietante caso de Lillith Sullivan, una niña con un extraño y misterioso pasado.

programme.title: La hija de la luz
programme.desc: Con rasgos que rememoran al sexto sentido y la profecía llega este fascinante thriller sobrenatural lleno de escalofríos y un gran suspenso.

programme.title: Paint Your Wagon
programme.desc: A Michigan farmer and a prospector form a partnership in the California gold country. Their adventures include buying and sharing a wife...

programme.title: Oklahoma!
programme.desc: In Oklahoma, several farmers, cowboys and a traveling salesman compete for the romantic favors of various local ladies.

programme.title: The Hills Run Red
programme.desc: A man recently released from a five-year prison sentence seeks vengeance against the former friend who has violated his trust and sought his death. Starring Thomas Hunter, Henry Silva, and Dan Duryea.

programme.title: Cow Town
programme.desc: Barbed wire is brought to the open range in a secret plan is to bring sheep into the territory, and the ranchers are urged to fight against it. Gene Autry makes certain that nothing shady is going on.

programme.title: Indian Territory
programme.desc: Following the Civil War, Cavalry Sergeant Gene Autry is sent to break up a series of Indian raids upon settlers, led by a renegade Austrian, who wishes to use the Indians to build an empire.

programme.title: John Sturges' The Hallelujah Trail
programme.desc: Chaos reigns on the wide open plains as a host of stars, including Burt Lancaster and Lee Remick, have their eyes set on a shipment of whiskey and let loose in this wild comedy that spoofs nearly every convention of movie westerns.

programme.title: The Desperate Hours
programme.desc: Bogart plays an escaped con who has nothing to lose. March is a suburban Everyman who has everything to lose - his family is held hostage by Bogart.

programme.title: Sabrina
programme.desc: Bogie and Holden are the mega-rich Larrabee brothers of Long Island. Bogie’s all work, Holden’s all playboy. But when Sabrina (Hepburn), daughter of the family’s chauffeur, returns from Paris, the stage is set for some family fireworks.

programme.title: The Barefoot Contessa
programme.desc: A waning director revives his career after discovering a beautiful Spanish dancer and makes her into a Hollywood star. Ava Gardner, Humphrey Bogart and Edmond O’Brien star in this bitter tale of stardom won and wasted from Joseph L. Mankiewicz.

programme.title: The Miracle Worker
programme.desc: Academy Awards went to Best Actress Anne Bancroft and Best Supporting Actress Patty Duke for their moving portrayals of Annie Sullivan and her remarkable blind and deaf pupil, Helen Keller.

programme.title: Hangmen Also Die
programme.desc: After the German administrator of Czechoslovakia is shot, his assassin tries to elude the Gestapo and struggles with his impulse to give himself up as hostages are executed.

programme.title: The Russians Are Coming, The Russians Are Coming
programme.desc: Alan Arkin and Jonathan Winters lead an all-star cast (Carl Reiner, Eva Marie Saint, Brian Keith, Theodore Bikel) in this outrageous comedy about a Russian submarine that runs aground off the New England coast.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer and Carter buy Hong Kong suits from con man Friendly Freddy.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer tries to convince his friends that a movie star has invited them all to a barbecue at her house.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: After Lisa attends a Women's Liberation League meeting, she gives Oliver a scolding for denying her equal rights and demands to swap chores. While Lisa does a stellar job at Oliver's work, Oliver's attempts at hers leave something to be desired.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Little Lori Baker, who after coming to stay with the Douglases on a rural experience program, is staying on at the Douglas farm. This city girl, like Oliver, has found that she loves the country life! Lisa decides to throw Lori a welcome party.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: The residents of Hooterville assume that Oliver Douglas must be broke when Lisa is spotted looking for work and standing in line at the soup kitchen. But assumptions in this town, even logical ones, are bound to be wrong.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver is having a tough time. He has no one to help him pick the apples from his orchard, and he's promised to teach Lisa how to drive. The neighbors are all injured from assisting other harvests, and Lisa has a run-in with a sheriff.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: When a gangster who passes as Oliver's doppelganger arrives in town with his wife and partner to hide out from the law, a rumor spreads that Oliver is a cheat. Oliver seeks to save his good name, and Lisa tries figure out which Oliver is Oliver!

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Eb believes he has found his destiny when an accounting course he has enrolled in turns out to be acting workshop. All the world's a stage. Ed dives into acting and turns every simple interaction at the Douglas farm into a starring role.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: There is the old adage that warns never to discuss politics with your spouse... but what if you are both running for the same office?! That predicament comes true when Oliver and Lisa face each other in the Hooterville mayoral election.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver refuses to take Lisa to New York City to attend the wedding anniversary of an old friend. Meanwhile, Eb, always up to something, has a new invisible friend named Charlie. To get her way, Lisa introduces her own invisible friend... Natasha.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa gives the financially-challenged Eb her engagement ring to present to Darlene, his longtime sweetheart, so that he can pop the question. The ring is reportedly valued at $2,000, however, when Darlene's father has it appraised, it's a shocker.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: While shopping at the supermarket, Edith befriends a lonely old man, Mr. Quigley, who ran away from the nursing home.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: While spending time at the Lorenzo's home, Gloria admires a statue replica of Rodin's 'The Kiss.' Seeing the admiration in Gloria's eyes, Irene gives her the statue. However, Archie is infuriated by it, citing that it's pornography.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: A computer error leads Edith into collecting a small fortune in quarters sent to her in the mail by a prune company. When Archie discovers this, he immediately wants to keep the money and doesn't want Edith to say anything to the company.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Mike is all excited when the Lorenzos and Lionel are coming over after dinner for a game of 'Group Therapy.' Archie takes one look at some of the questions that are asked during a game and quickly rushes off for drinks at Kelsey's bar.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: When Louie's mother announces her plans to remarry, the panicked dispatcher threatens to sever all ties with her unless she cancels the marriage.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: A jubilant Tony returns to boxing as the manager of a young heavyweight, thrilling Louie, who anticipates recouping his wagering losses to Alex by betting against Banta's boxer.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie carries his actions and insults too far, prompting Elaine to enlist help from a women's organization. Soon, the dispatcher's lecherous laughter is transformed into comical pleading when he is booted out of his job.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Joy blossoms at the Sunshine Cab Co. when a triumphant Bobby Wheeler returns to proclaim that he's landed a TV series role. Louie, in his own charming way, puts a damper on the celebration.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The pretty new cabbie proves to be more than Alex can handle when she leaves the meter running, in an attempt to lure him into romance.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: A young runaway wreaks havoc at the Sunshine Cab Co. when Alex and Elaine encourage the lad to return home. Jim wants to adopt him, and Louie wants the youngster jailed for not paying his fare.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Romance and merriment are on the menu for Tony and Alex when they double-date gorgeous twin models at a posh restaurant, only to have the intimate group grow to a crowd with the unwelcome additions of Jim and Alex's ex-wife.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Elaine blows a bundle on the Big Apple's hottest hair stylist for the social bash of the year.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Tony begins working with a new cabbie, Lucius, a former football player. Lucius inspires Tony to try to get his boxing license reinstated.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Ring the bells! Spread the word! Latka Gravas and Simka Dahblitz are getting married, and the dingy Sunshine Cab Co. garage is transformed into a chapel of beauty for the social event of the cabbies' season.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The unflappable Jim gets an unexpected jolt when a wrecking ball crashes through the wall of his condemned apartment. A disaster ensues when he is forced to move in with Louie.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The drivers bare their souls, recalling those moments in their lives when fate caused them to detour from the street of dreams down the alley to becoming a cabbie.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Having served his time, Prosper Hoag is on parole and back home in Sparta. The folks in town will never forget the accident he caused that resulted in the death of three children and permanent injuries to two others, but will they forgive him?

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Chief Gillespie's personal relationship with Harriet DeLong is tested when her ex-husband Vic Glendon is caught committing an armed robbery, and her son Eugene is suspected of being involved when some of the stolen money is found in his possession.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Sweet's friends, the Tibbits, are an older couple that own a bookshop in Sparta. When Mrs. Tibbits is shot and killed during an apparent robbery, Gillespie and Tibbs question the suspicious circumstances around her death. Was her death planned?

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Virgil Tibbs is working hard to reunite his family, when he discovers that his aunt's son may be involved in a murder. Virgil is caught between hurting his aunt who loves her son and bringing justice to the town he works to protect every day.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: The owner of a local gym in Sparta, Kathleen Wheartly, tries to protect her delinquent brother, Jack, who is falsely accused of murder. She soon finds that her own life is in danger when a ruthless bounty hunter shows up in town, looking for Jack.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: It’s Christmastime and an eager journalist from the local Sparta Herald newspaper begs to interview the police force; however, when she twists their stories to fit her negative agenda, the officers learn a hard lesson about the power of the press.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Gillespie and Tibbs investigate a fatal car crash. The driver, Robbie Jeffries, suffered severe injuries in the accident, and his girlfriend Becky was killed. Everyone is surprised when the medical reports show Robbie may have been poisoned.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Ray Garrett was convicted of murdering his wife's lover. Pleading his innocence from the start, he was still convicted of the crime and sentenced to death. Will time run out for the death row prisoner as the Sparta police attempt to save his life?

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Terry and Derek Johnson are two brothers at odds with each other. Terry makes good grades and has a scholarship waiting for him, but Derek has chosen to deal drugs. When a local boy dies of an overdose, Gillespie wants Derek charged with murder.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: The Sparta Police investigate a suspicious car crash and discover connections to a fraudulent development plan to build a new mall in Sparta and to the murder of Virgil Tibbs’ old friend who had invested his life savings into the deal.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Julie Lofton is a blind woman who witnesses the murder of her neighbor and quickly calls the Sparta police. As the police investigate, they discover the murder was committed to cover up an industrial crime, and now Julie's life may be in danger.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: A high school student is the only witness to the brutal rape of his teacher, but his overprotective father refuses to allow him to get involved. He wants to help catch the man that assaulted his teacher, but is he brave enough to disobey his father?

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Bubba Skinner goes to Los Angeles to take custody of a suspected arsonist and bring him back to Sparta, but the arsonist disappears and is later found murdered. A pretty insurance fraud investigator helps Bubba uncover the truth behind the murder.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Vic Glendon, the ex-husband of Sparta councilperson Harriet DeLong, has been charged with murder and is facing a death sentence. Harriet's teenage son, Eugene, is most affected by the trial and the conflict he feels towards his criminal father.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan's day begins with a phone call from a kidnapper who happened to dial the wrong number - his! The kidnapper believes he's called the original victim and demands Dr. Sloan deliver money if he wants to see his son alive.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A homicide investigation turns into a federal case when a "corpse" creates a reign of terror at Community General. Amanda prepares for her autopsy on blood-soaked John Doe when he springs to life, putting a stranglehold on Amanda!

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: After heading out to a mountain cabin, Jesse goes missing, only to turn up five days later in Utah, claiming to have been abducted by aliens.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Novelist Kay Ludlow is dealing with writer's block while her literary agent Jim Rothman pressures her to turn out 350 pages by the following day to secure his two million dollar share.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Amanda cruises into cyberspace during a spell of boredom and randomly enters the website "Welcome to Joanne's living room" for mindless entertainment.

programme.title: Twin Peaks
programme.desc: James saves the girls from a tormented Harold. Cooper brings Audrey home. Bobby and Shelly learn that their insurance plans have backfired. Donna tries to convince Truman that Harold Smith has Laura's secret diary.

programme.title: Twin Peaks
programme.desc: Cooper and the One-Armed Man inspect guests at the Great Northern. Hawk finds Harold Smith dead by his own hand…with a mysterious suicide note and the diary torn to shreds. Leo speaks to Bobby about "new shoes."

programme.title: Twin Peaks
programme.desc: Donna and James wonder why Maddy left so suddenly. Norma's mother arrives with news…she's married a new man, Ernie Niles. Cooper tells Leland they arrested Ben Horne for Laura's murder.

programme.title: The Commish: Charlie Don't Surf
programme.desc: Vietnamese gangs threaten Eastbridge and Tony steps in to help.

programme.title: The Commish: Skeletons
programme.desc: A mugging triggers a woman's repressed memory of her brother's murder, which she witnessed as a child.

programme.title: The Commish: The Wicked Flee
programme.desc: After seeing his mother killed by a stranger, a boy withdraws deep into himself, prompting a sympathetic Tony to step up his efforts to catch the murderer.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Steve joins his troubled partner, Reggie Ackroyd, in a rehab facility for stressed-out cops. Reggie seems delusional and keeps blaming a murderer he caught for abducting his wife and daughter, and Steve encourages him.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: It's a busy day for the homicide unit and Community General when three murders take place. Further investigation reveals that none of the suspects knew their victims, and they are all terminal patients at Community General.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Jesse and Susan are on their way to Mount Carmel for a romantic getaway weekend but detour to a fishing town when their car breaks down. They grab a bite at the local diner when Susan sees a man she used to know.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama gets her own radio show.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Thelma's high school reputation comes back to haunt her at her 50th class reunion.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: The family hires a psychic whose predictions all come true. But when Mama realizes where she's getting her information, Mama goes into a trance of her own to expose the charlatan.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: When Mama signs up for an open microphone night, another comedian steals all her jokes. She improvises by talking about her family, and the audience bursts out in laughter.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama finds an old certificate for 10 shares of stock, which is now worth enough to convene a shareholders' meeting of the company that is about to lay Vint off.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: The heavy metal band that Bubba arranges for the homecoming dance turns out to be three girls. Their grandmother's cake recipe and the band are both a hit at the church carnival.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: All's fair in love and war when Vint and Naomi get in an argument and Mama and Iola battle it out to grow the winning rose at this year's flower show.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Al is shocked about having another kid when Peggy's relatives leave their five-year-old son Seven in the Bundy home.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Kelly has to walk through the wilderness after dumping her boyfriend in the forest. Al and Peg try to 'talk' their marriage alive, but without success. Bud dates a girl with the measles.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Peggy discovers that Seven does not know when his birthday is, and the family decides to celebrate him... on Al's birthday.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Al has to take a job as a topless bartender to pay for Seven's doctor bill, but Peggy fears that Bud and Kelly might make Seven sick, and kicks them out of the house.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Peggy tries to make Al more interested in having sex with her by purchasing new dresses, unsuccessfully.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Bud starts his own fraternity to get women.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: The Bundys vote against a two cent beer tax.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Al makes Kelly get a job, so she becomes a waitress.

programme.title: Family Affair
programme.desc: Mr. French, Cissy, Buffy, and Jody decide to give Bill some time alone for the weekend. Unfortunately, while they are away, a barrage of neighbors stops by, disrupting Bill's relaxation, peace, and quiet.

programme.title: Family Affair
programme.desc: A former friend of Bill's visits, asking for a favor. Harv has just gotten out of prison and needs to find a job. The twins are afraid of Harv, and Cissy thinks she can help him adjust to living outside of prison again.

programme.title: Family Affair
programme.desc: One of Cissy's friends has a crush on Uncle Bill, and he cannot shake her from this feeling.

programme.title: Family Affair
programme.desc: Cissy decides it is time to move out on her own, so she moves into an apartment with a friend. It seems like she hasn't left home when her family constantly visits her. She tells them to let her enjoy her own place by herself.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie comes home for a nice dinner that Edith has prepared: beef and mushroom stew. Later, Mike breaks the news that there's been a recall of mushrooms. Convinced that he has food poisoning, Archie rushes down to the hospital for treatment.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Gloria comes home from work one evening in a total apathetic mood. When Archie tries to find out what's wrong with her, she snaps at him and storms off. Later, she confides in Edith that she thinks that she has temporarily fallen out of love with Mike.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Mike's graduation day is coming up fast. Archie begins acting nicely to Mike, since Archie has high hopes that once Mike graduates, he will finally move out of the house and begin repaying Archie the room and board that he owes him.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie stops by Jefferson Cleaners to pick up some dry cleaning and pays with a twenty dollar bill. Later, a furious George shows up at the Bunker's front door claiming the bill Archie passed to him was counterfeit.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Mike and Gloria worry about Archie's sudden disappearance while on his way to a union convention in Buffalo.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: After discovering that Archie is missing, Edith goes down to the police station with Mike to file a missing persons report. Mike discovers a photo of Archie with another woman. This leads him to believe that Archie may have run off with another woman.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Edith has news that Archie finally called home to let everyone know where he was. Supposedly he got sidetracked to a podiatrists' convention in Rochester.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: With Archie out on strike, household funds have begun to dwindle, leaving Edith in a touch position trying to balance the little household income that is coming in. Tempers flare as Archie finds himself with nothing to do but sit around the house.

programme.title: Strauss Gala
programme.desc: An evening of polkas, waltzes and operetta melodies with Maestro Zubin Mehta.

programme.title: Classica Spotlight
programme.desc: Cinematic clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up and coming artists.

programme.title: Hollywood Gala
programme.desc: A firework display with music from Hollywood films.

programme.title: Classica Spotlight
programme.desc: Cinematic clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up and coming artists.

programme.title: A Tango Night: Live from Buenos Aires
programme.desc: The Orquesta Filarmónica del Teatro Colón under Daniel Barenboim performs live at an Argentinean music festival.

programme.title: Romeo and Juliet
programme.desc: Prairie High School drama club presents "Romeo and Juliet."

programme.title: Classica Spotlight
programme.desc: Cinematic clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up and coming artists.

programme.title: Grieg's Piano Concerto & Beethoven Symphony No. 7
programme.desc: Conductor Jan Latham-Koenig leads the Flanders Symphony Orchestra in a concert recorded at Concertgebouw Brugge, Belgium; Felix Mendelssohn's concert overture Die Hebriden, Op. 26; Edvard Grieg's Piano Concerto in A minor, Op. 16.

programme.title: La Bayadere
programme.desc: The Paris Opera Ballet performs the work choreographed by Rudolf Nureyev.

programme.title: Classica Spotlight
programme.desc: Cinematic clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up and coming artists.

programme.title: Bach - Brandenburg Concertos, BWV 1046-1051
programme.desc: In celebration of the pieces' 300th anniversary, Czech harpsichordist and conductor Václav Luks and the renowned Baroque ensemble Collegium 1704 record all six Brandenburg Concertos on historical instruments in 2021.

programme.title: America Says
programme.desc: Two teams of friends and family race against a clock to guess how America filled in the blanks on a series of survey questions covering every topic under the sun. John Michael Higgins hosts.

programme.title: Baggage
programme.desc: Jerry Springer hosts as daters decide how much emotional "baggage" they are willing to put up with when finding love. Today, a dater must choose between men whose baggage includes dumping girlfriends via text message and having 250 unicorn figurines.

programme.desc: Jerry Springer hosts as daters decide how much emotional "baggage" they are willing to put up with when finding love. Today, a dater must choose between men whose baggage includes wearing a thong and always complaining at restaurants.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una estudiante de último año de la universidad fue violada y asesinada cerca de un sendero sin pavimentar utilizado por los estudiantes para caminar de un lado del campus al otro.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1999, Valiree Jackson, de 9 años, desapareció camino a la escuela cerca de Spokane. Su padre, Brad Jackson, denunció la desaparición y toda la comunidad comenzó a buscar a su secuestrador.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Plato frío
programme.desc: Un hombre murió en su casa después de una larga historia de enfermedad cardíaca. Se asumió que esta fue la causa de su muerte.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el año 2000, el cuerpo de la bailarina exótica Rachel Siani fue encontrado debajo de un puente de Nueva Jersey. Los investigadores se preguntaron si se había suicidado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Entre 1985 y 1988, 18 personas fueron asfixiadas, abusadas sexualmente y dadas por muertas en las remotas montañas de California.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando la casa de un policía se incendia, los expertos sospechan de un incendio provocado. El oficial cuya casa fue incendiada arresta al narcotraficante de bajo nivel James Wren, quien confiesa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Tracey Frame, de 35 años, fue condenada por el asesinato de David Nixon en Abril del 2002 después de que él había planeado terminar su relación.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Asesinato en el menú
programme.desc: Cuando el jefe de cocina de un restaurante histórico de Filadelfia fue encontrado muerto, los investigadores entrevistaron a los sospechosos habituales: familiares, amigos y compañeros de trabajo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pura suerte
programme.desc: En 1991, la esposa de un militar fue brutalmente asesinada en Filipinas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de ser admitido en el hospital con una hemorragia inexplicable, Chad Shelton de 11 meses llega a fallecer. Los investigadores y científicos buscan desesperadamente una causa cuando otros de la misma casa se enferman.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El Septiembre de 1984, en un suburbio de Tucson, Arizona, Vicki Hoskins, de ocho años, salió de su casa en su bicicleta rosada para enviar una carta a su madre. Ella nunca regresó, pero su bicicleta ligeramente dañada fue encontrada en las cercanías.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran muerta a la esposa de un dentista bien conocido, la policía se esfuerza por identificar a un sospechoso. Algunas fibras y un estudio de los patrones climáticos en la noche del asesinato abren el caso y revelan al asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los doctores del hospital no pudieron determinar la causa de las alucinaciones y el intenso dolor de Bobby Curley. Lo trataron como un trastorno neurológico pero su estado se deterioró. Él estaba siendo envenenado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: El mal pie
programme.desc: La policía estaba desconcertada por una huella oscura encontrada en la escena del crimen donde un hombre había sido asesinado y dos adolescentes resultaron gravemente heridas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra muerta a Leann Fletcher, los investigadores usan análisis de salpicaduras de sangre y computación forense para encontrar el motivo de su asesinato: su esposo, estaba teniendo una aventura con la jueza Susan Chrzanowski.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Trampa para turistas
programme.desc: En 1993, el estado de Florida era conocido por algo más que Disney World. La atención mundial se centró en una serie de robos dirigidos a turistas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1987, se descubrieron un cráneo humano y algunos huesos en un campamento de niños exploradores cerca de Farmington, Missouri. La reconstrucción facial ayuda a los investigadores en este caso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La víctima había sido apuñalada más de treinta veces y la escena del crimen estaba inundada de sangre. Cerca de su cabeza, la policía descubrió un distintivo botón con hebras de hilo todavía unidas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el año 2000, Judy Southern llegó a casa del trabajo y recibió un disparo de un hombre armado que esperaba dentro. Su esposo llegó poco después, llamó a los servicios de emergencia y la llevó al hospital.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La investigación sobre una estudiante universitaria desaparecida lleva a la policía a descubrir que, sin que sus amigos lo supieran, vivía una extraña doble vida, asistía a la escuela de día y trabajaba como prostituta de noche.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un asesinato brutal, muchos sospechosos y pruebas contradictorias, pero los forenses fueron claros en una cosa: el asesino conocía a su víctima. Y eso les dio a los investigadores una ventaja.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Batallón de pruebas
programme.desc: Una madre de dos niños pequeños fue encontrada muerta en su habitación.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los síntomas parecidos a los de la gripe de una madre y sus hijos resultan ser algo más grave: intoxicación por talio. Después de la muerte de la madre, los investigadores centran su atención en encontrar al asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En las zonas rurales de Canadá, el Dr. John Schneeberger es acusado de sedar y agredir sexualmente a una de sus pacientes y a su hijastra. Las pruebas de ADN demuestran que el doctor es inocente, pero la paciente insiste en que la sedó y violó.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Crimen limpio

programme.desc: Jenna gets baptized, but did she do it for the wrong reasons? Drew is failing his classes, and considers dropping out of Degrassi. Connor's tweets embarrass Clare in front of Asher.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Clare tries to impress Asher by pitching a story about Romeo and Jules. K.C. and Bianca play matchmaker for K.C.'s mom. Katie chaperones Maya's date with Cam.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: A secret is eating away at Clare, but will facing the truth make things worse for her? K.C.'s mom has some surprising news. Meanwhile, Maya tries to impress Cam.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Cam needs a break from hockey, so he blows off practice to hang out with Maya. K.C.'s dad is release from jail, but is he ready to have him back in the picture? Fiona's loft is a disaster, and she blames her new roommate -- Drew.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Cam struggles to live up to everyone's expectations on the ice. K.C. wants his dad out of his life -- even if it means doing something drastic. Drew and Fiona try to work out their differences.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Imogen designs an elaborate set for Romeo and Jules, and reaches out to her estranged mother for the money to build it. Meanwhile, Becky interferes with ticket sales.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Imogen worries about her dad's strange behavior. Becky bonds with Adam without realizing that he's transgender. Katie and Jake realize they have feelings for each other -- but where does that leave Mike Dallas?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Clare writes an article that stirs up trouble at school and makes her a new enemy -- Mike Dallas. Tori, Tristan, and Dave compete in a talent contest. Drew feels distant from Bianca, so he goes on a spending spree.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Eli organizes a surprise birthday party to cheer Clare up, and starts to suspect that she's hiding something. Audra urges Drew to go back to Degrassi. Dave worries that he and Alli are growing apart.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When a group of parents try to stop the play, Eli takes action. As opening night approaches, Tristan realizes that if he doesn't find a boyfriend fast, his first kiss will be onstage -- with Dave. Meanwhile, Becky wants to "save" Adam.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: On opening night for Romeo and Jules, Tristan is nowhere to be found. Is it stage fright -- or something worse? While Eli is busy with the play, Clare decides to get even with Asher.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: As Becky begins to fall for Adam, she worries how her conservative parents will react.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Becky doesn't want to keep Adam a secret, so she decides to tell her parents that he's transgender.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The Jurassic period saw the advent of the largest and strongest dinosaurs that ever roamed the Earth.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: A look at the world as it was 149 million years ago - in the late Jurassic Period. The old continents have broken up and much of the land is under water. Huge shallow seas have supported a revolution in marine life.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: With wings longer than those of a small plane, pterosaurs were the largest creatures ever known to have flown.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: This programme looks at the Cretaceous period, 106 million years ago. Volcanic activity forces the continents apart, and dinosaurs diversify into a range of species to cope with environmental extremes.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: It is the late Cretaceous period and Tyrannosaurus rex is the top predator, but the Earth is poisoned by volcanic activity and a comet strikes.

programme.title: Attenborough and the Giant Dinosaur
programme.desc: David Attenborough tells the story of the discovery and reconstruction in Argentina of the world's largest known dinosaur, a brand new species of titanosaur. Measuring 37m long, it now holds the record as the biggest animal ever to walk the earth.

programme.title: Tutankhamun: Life, Death and Legacy
programme.desc: Dan meets the mummies of Tutankhamun's parents at the Egyptian Museum in Cairo, and discovers that they were actually brother and sister. CT scans reveal how this incestuous relationship could have been responsible for Tutankhamun's poor health.

programme.title: Tutankhamun: Life, Death and Legacy
programme.desc: Picking up the story in 1323BC, the pharaoh sustains the injury that would eventually kill him. Dan investigates a scan of Tutankhamun's skeleton, while John visits Howard Carter's house and probes the 1920s craze of `Tutmania'.

programme.title: Tutankhamun: Life, Death and Legacy
programme.desc: Dan discovers a series of anomalies in Tutankhamun's burial, and spots that the faces on his coffins and canopic jars do not match that of the famous golden mask. Raksha looks at Seti's tomb, which shows how hurried Tutankhamun's was in comparison.

programme.title: Planet Dinosaur
programme.desc: It is only in recent years that experts have unearthed the biggest dinosaurs that ever lived. One monster eclipsed all others, more than seven times as heavy as diplodocus was the immense argentinosaurus.

programme.title: Planet Dinosaur
programme.desc: A new generation of carnivores was about to take killing to the next level. At the end of the Cretaceous period, these new hunter killers had spread throughout the globe.

programme.title: Planet Dinosaur
programme.desc: A look at bizarre dinosaurs such as the curious buck-toothed Exipdexipteryx, the amazing four-winged Microraptor and the pot-bellied Nothronychus.

programme.title: Lost Cities of The Ancients
programme.desc: A journey to discover the legendary lost city of Piramesse, a magnificent ancient capital built 3,000 years ago by the Egyptian pharaoh Ramesses the Great.

programme.title: Lost Cities of The Ancients
programme.desc: In the Lambeyeque valley in northern Peru lies a strange lost world, the forgotten ruins of 250 mysterious pyramids, including some of the biggest on the planet, colossal structures made out of mud bricks.

programme.title: Lost Cities of The Ancients
programme.desc: It was one of the greatest vanishing acts in history. More than 3,000 years ago a mysterious and ruthless civilisation rose from nothing, created a brutal and unstoppable army and built an empire that rivalled Egypt and Babylon.

programme.title: Ice Age Giants
programme.desc: Discover the beasts of the Ice Age with Professor Alice Roberts. Alice's adventure begins in the Land of the Sabre-tooth.

programme.desc: A puppy terrorizes its owner's cat; a spoiled Yorkshire terrier; a Rottweiler is aggressive toward strangers.

programme.desc: A golden retriever mix with canine aggression; a bearded collie who barks, howls and scratches at her owner's boyfriend's guitar; a Lhasa apso/Cavalier Kind Charles Spaniel with canine aggression.

programme.desc: Going after two fugitives in one day is tough enough without the facing Colorado's notoriously unpredictable weather. Today it's the threat of severe thunderstorm, hail and area wide tornado warnings.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It hurts Dog to see people who?after years of walking the straight and narrow, suddenly lose their way. But today's case is a member of the law enforcement community who has recently gone astray, and that truly troubles the Dog.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is back in Denver and in hot pursuit of a woman wanted for identity theft. The sad reality is that the identity which has been robbed is her own. She's traded in a bright future for a life on the wrong side of the law.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Being hunted by the Dog is a lousy way to celebrate your birthday, but that's exactly the spot that Robert finds himself in today. He's missed his court date, quit his job, and vacated his last known address.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Both brother Tim and fellow Honolulu bondsman James need Dog's help to track down their hard to find fugitives. The two cases on the docket today are challenging, especially the hunt for Gregory, a felon with a lengthy rap sheet. A quick check of his

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's Beth's birthday and Dog knows just what she needs. He surprises Beth with Delilah, a puppy small enough to sit in the palm of her hand. Beth is so happy that she insists on taking the puppy with her on today's bounty.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's Halloween, and before Dog and Beth can help the kids carve their pumpkins, they have some business to attend to. It involves knocking on doors and meeting the neighbors, but instead of hunting for treats, they're on the search for a fugitive.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team have girl trouble in this case. Krystal jumped bail and seems to have vanished into the high plains of Colorado. To make matters worse, she's running with her lover (and bond co-signer) Carrie. But Thelma and Louise they ain't.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today, Leland and Dog make a quick visit to the police supply store to get some new gadgets for the team. But they can't linger because they've also got a fugitive to catch. Their target is reputed to have an explosive temper.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When an offender, with a long record, ducks his day in court, Bobby Brown knows whom to call--The Dog!? And knowing that few souls can resist Beth's clever persuasion, Dog gives her the job of luring the fugitive in.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today's case is a twofer, a brother and sister both charged with drug related offenses. Also, Dog has crossed paths with the brother before. He once tried to stop Dog from arresting one of the most violent fugitives of his career.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When a brother bondsman from Washington State calls Dog for help tracking a runner in search of fun in the sun on the tropical paradise of Kauai, the team gets on the case. Dog's only problem? No leads!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and team help out a bondsman friend whose client jumped bail, but the target is a blank slate. Are his tattoos gang related? Is he likely to be violent? And making matters worse, when they hit his apartment, they learn he is moving out.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: They say you can't teach an old dog new tricks, but what if it's The Dog doing the teaching? Today's target is wanted on domestic abuse charges, but when Dog discovers she works for an escort service, he opts for a new twist on an old ruse.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Things get stressful when Dog and the team race to Honolulu International to catch a felon who's booked on an afternoon flight to Florida owing $140,000 to a bondsman.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: After Dog's son-in-law, Travis, signs off on an iffy bond and the accused turns into a fugitive, Dog and Beth decide to bring Travis on his first bounty. What better way to teach him than to show him just how hard it can be to bring in your man!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog knows that it is better to give than to receive, so when a fellow bondsman grieving for his recently departed spouse requests his help, he jumps into action. While studying the fugitive's file, the team uncovers a surprising fact.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: No one becomes a bondsman overnight and even the members of Dog's team know there is always more to learn. So when Duane Lee cuts a felon a little too much slack about checking-in and then goes missing, Duane Lee knows he's gonna get schooled.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: What starts out as a perfect day for Dog turns ugly fast. He and Beth are enjoying helping their kids learn how to care for their new pets, when duty calls for a tough case. The charges: alleged cruelty to animals.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: In between tracking down a potentially dangerous ex-con facing a five-year stretch in the big house, Leland is struggling to find time to train and compete for his first boxing match in years.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and family head to Kona to track down a wanted father who's looking to bolt to the mainland to evade sentencing. Meanwhile, Dog does some evading of his own - Avoiding the much dreaded birthday party!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team need to help Leland hunt down some elusive fugitives The case is a family affair with both mother and daughter in trouble with the law.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog knows that crime and drugs not only damage victims but also harm the families of the perpetrators, especially the kids. And both of the fugitives he's chasing today have left shattered families and struggling women in their wake.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Jim is a bondsman and longtime friend of Dog. Jim's son has just started in the family business. Today Jim has asked Dog to track down a potentially dangerous fugitive, and take his son along for some training with the best in the world.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis brings Ben Carrington to the masquerade ball; Adam's scheme to blackmail Bart Fallmont is realized; Garrett confronts Dominique with his suspicion that Jackie is his daughter; Alexis learns of Caress' secret book.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Bart's secret past yields triumph for Denver-Carrington, but Blake faces possible defeat in the courtroom battle with his brother, Ben; Dex rejects Amanda's affections; Alexis sabotages Caress' plans to publish a potentially damaging expose.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Jackie discovers her father is listed as "unknown" on her birth certificate. Alexis buys the company planning to publish Caress' book. Fighting for his empire, Blake must endure the devastating lies of the one woman bent on his destruction -- Alexis.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake's hopes for victory are crushed by a drunken witness; Bart is dropped as a senatorial candidate; the woman who can clear Blake's name is forced to conceal her identity.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake loses the trial and now fears losing Denver-Carrington; Ben and Alexis pit themselves against Blake and Caress; Garrett learns that he is Jackie's father; a reporter's lies intensify the battle between Alexis and Blake.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Caress discovers Emily and Ben's secret and Blake is double-crossed by an old friend. Alexis schemes to turn the Chinese government against Blake; Claudia threatens to reveal Adam's power of attorney over Denver-Carrington.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake is tricked into borrowing money from Alexis; Jackie returns home to some shocking news; Blake learns the identity of the woman who can save his reputation; ignored by family and taunted by a reporter, Amanda attempts suicide.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: The guilt-ridden Alexis fears she is too late when she finds Amanda unconscious; Dominique proposes to Garrett; Steven believes he may lose Danny to Sammy Jo and Clay; Ben makes special plans for Caress and Alexis.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Successfully proving Blake and Alexis dishonorable, Ben is given control of the South China Sea leases; Steven attempts to uncover Adam's secret; Dominique's wedding day approaches; Sammy Jo and Clay find romance by candlelight.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake attacks Alexis when she attempts to take over the mansion; an emotionally disturbed Claudia is trapped by a wall of flame; Sammy Jo and Amanda fight for Clay's affections; Dominique learns the truth about Garrett's first marriage.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis's life is spared as Krystle is able to restrain Blake's lethal temper; as La Mirage burns, Amanda is rescued by a mysterious stranger; Claudia is claimed victim by the ravaging flames.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: An incensed Blake discovers the morning headlines accusing him of murder and arson; Adam offers his loyalties to Alexis and Colbyco; Alexis acquires enough stock to assume control of Denver-Carrington.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: As Krystle recovers from the accident, Alexis persuades the D.A. to suspect Blake of arson; Dominique offers Blake a 50 million dollar loan; Phill Thorpe threatens to murder Krystle in retribution against Blake.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake fires the La Mirage manager for withholding crucial information regarding the fire; Alexis offers a reward for the arrest and conviction of the arsonist; Michael Culhane continues to romance Amanda.

programme.desc: Mallory resents Elyse for the advice she gives her pregnant friend.

programme.desc: Alex amasses a bundle by playing the stock market on paper for his economics class, and courts disaster by secretly investing his father's money.

programme.title: Family Ties

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1984, a passerby finds the torso of a woman in a cardboard box. A forensic entomologist analyzes nearby insect activity to determine when the victim was killed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A 13-year-old girl went missing from her Colorado home. The only evidence the kidnapper left behind was three fingerprints on a window screen.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Edward Post drew a bath for his wife before going for a run. He returned to find her not breathing. She died before emergency response arrived. Police considered her death accidental until a motive surfaced.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2003, Tiffany Rowell and three of her friends were brutally murdered in affluent Clear Lake, Texas.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A beautiful young woman falls to her death from a cliff overlooking the ocean. Initially, investigators think it was a tragic accident. But after a forensic examination, police uncover a very different picture of what happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1971, John List left a note with the bodies of his mother, wife and three children in his mansion ballroom before disappearing completely. Detectives must solve the case, despite having only an outdated photograph of List.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1998, a Maryland murder mystery performance turns into a real whodunit when the badly burned body of Stephen Hricko is discovered in his hotel room.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Haunted by the disappearance of her mother, a young woman undertakes an investigation of her own. In her mother's diary, she discovers a dark family secret that might explain the disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The investigation into the kidnapping and rape of an 18-year-old Ohio woman is aided when the victim returns hours after the incident occurred. With her help, the police are able to track the assailant to his front door.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Doctors are puzzled when a two-year-old boy is rushed to the hospital with brain seizures and breathing difficulties. Finally, the boy's sister provides an important clue, raising the possibility of a rare syndrome.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A highway patrolman was dispatched to what he thought would be a routine traffic accident — until he looked in the car. He had seen hundreds of accidents, but none with as much blood as this.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2008, college co-ed Jenna Verhaalen was found dead in her Bryan, Texas apartment. Petechial hemorrhages in her eyes indicated that she was strangled.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Several suspects and conflicting evidence complicated a brutal murder investigation. But the forensics were clear on one thing: the killer knew his victim, and that alone gave investigators a head start.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The medical examiner ruled the death an accident, but the detectives investigating the case thought the evidence at the scene indicated otherwise.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Survivors of Nazi atrocities recognized Archbishop Trifa, former head of the Romanian Orthodox Church in America, as having directed a bloody attack against Jews during World War II. He was deported in 1984 and died three years later.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Soon after organizing a workers' strike, a union official is executed in his home. Neither his wife nor anyone in the neighborhood hear any gunshots. It takes a forensic sound test, an electron microscope and a nightgown to explain why.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The decomposed body of a young woman was discovered in a Bakersfield irrigation canal. If there was trace evidence, it had been washed away.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The police investigate when a severed leg is discovered among garbage. Conventional means of identifying the victim are impossible, leading investigators to rely on DNA, forensic anthropology and toxicology.

programme.desc: A man tells police he shot an intruder who had attacked and murdered his wife. The husband paints a tragic picture and is dubbed a hero. Four years later, forensic evidence leads police to re-examine the motives of this so-called hero.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Ghostly Refuge
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to Oswego, New York to investigate the renowned Fort Ontario. TAPS has investigated many forts, but never one that once served as a sanctuary for Jewish refugees during World War II.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Paranormal Politics
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads down South to help two different families find some closure. First stop is Baton Rouge, Louisiana to investigate the Old State Capital Building, which has endured theCivil War and a congressman's death.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Curtain Call

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Fear Factory
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Claremont, New Hampshire to investigate a former shoe and furniture factory, the Topstone Mill. What was once an abandoned space has now become a restaurant and bar...

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Tunnels of Terror
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Lockport, New York to investigate an underworld of tunnels. It holds a mystery of possible murder, multiple deaths and frightening phenomena. What stories do the spirits of Lockport Caves want to tell?

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Heir Apparition

programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Gloucester, Massachusetts to investigate Hammond Castle.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Due Date With Death
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Rochester, New York to investigate the Rochester Public Library's 15 years of claims. There's reason to believe that two deaths associated with the building could be behind the activity.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Haunted Home for the Holidays

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La compañía donde trabaja Gaspar atraviesa un recorte de personal pero el es de los pocos afortunados que se salva y es mandado a una capacitación a Estados Unidos, mientras que Peluzín toma el papel de Gaspar en México.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar atraviesa una crisis en su periodo de entrenamiento en Estados Unidos, mientras que el resto de la familia decide alcanzar a Gaspar

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se enamora de la estatua de cera de Ivanka Trump y toda la familia decide hacer un viaje y atravesar todo el país en auto hasta Nueva York.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide ir a NY a conocer a la verdadera Ivanka pero en el camino el grupo se separa de el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego sigue con su plan de casarse con la Ivanka de cera, mientras que el Abuelo y Peluzín afianzan su relación después de su gran viaje

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La familia va a Washington a pedir la mano de Ivanka con un resultado inesperado, mientras que Johnny busca deshacer la relación enfermiza entre el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego recibe la sorpresa que después de una muchos años de crímenes su papá le deja un jugoso botín como herencia, mientras que Jonathan y Ortega buscan a un adulto que los lleve a la premier de la película del momento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan es admitido a una reconocida escuela privada y Gaspar al no poder cubrir los gastos decide aventurarse con Peluzín en unos negocios turbios, mientras el Noruego busca consejos por parte de su familia porque no esta contento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El abuelo se ahoga con un hueso de pollo y LFDB se ve forzada a buscar ayuda de emergencia, mientras que el Noruego y Peluzín deciden ingresar a un gimnasio y competir por los resultados.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se involucra sentimentalmente con la nueva roommate del Noruego, la cual esconde un oscuro secreto, mientras tanto Peluzín y Jony buscan lanzar a Olaf al estrellato.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego cansado de que todo mundo lo busque solo por su dinero busca a Pitipú para que le ayude a idear un plan, mientras que Peluzín se embarca en el mundo de la robótica.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Ortega se va unos días a vivir con Jonathan y esto crea un conflicto con Olaf, mientras Irmita espera la visita de su prima a quien le esconde un gran secreto.

programme.desc: El edificio Pino es desalojado por causas de fuerza mayor y todos tienen que buscar donde vivir, mientras que el Abuelo se deja caer en una espiral descendente debido a su gran ego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego busca desesperadamente una forma para recuperar su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo se hace adicto al videojuego de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego todavía no puede asimilar que perdió toda su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo malaconseja a Peluzín de cómo pagar la renta atrasada de su departamento.

programme.desc: Irma organiza un club de peleas clandestinas, mientras que Pitipú decepcionado de sus conocimientos Bíblicos, decide embarcarse en el camino del mal.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP
programme.desc: Ana recibe a su fantasma más toxico y a Fraag lo "ghostean". El sexo de reconciliacion de Asaf y Lilian dura más que su proxima pelea. Valentino y Alex gritan su amor. Valeria se despide de la Villa. Diana y Chava son la pareja del momento.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP
programme.desc: Diana se asocia con sus dos amores. El deseo de Queen se cumple pero el precio a pagar por el es caro. Una Love Suite causa polemica. Asaf cae en la tentacion y Lilian elije a Bryan para vengarse. La Sala Tornado revela las mentiras de la Villa.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP
programme.desc: Yasmila y Asaf están en el ojo del huracán. Valeria aprovecha los estragos y se lleva a Aldo. Asaf y Lilian terminan de nuevo. Los sentimientos de Queen hacen que Ana explote y los de Diana hacen que Chava dude. El nuevo Ex llega interrumpiendo.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP
programme.desc: Llegan nuevos y peligrosos EX. Queen necesita una armadura para tanto golpe al corazon y Fano lucha por mantenerla cerca, mientras que Ana prefiere a Nina. Alex y Kevin se dan latigazos de desprecio en una fiesta en cueros.

programme.title: Súper Shore

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: La primera madrugada en Mykonos es muy agitada para nuestros shores, sobre todo para Mane, Esteban, Fernando y una invitada española

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Los shores comienzan el día paseo en barco donde las mexicanas dejan claro la antipatía hacia la millonaria italiana. Tras un regreso, los chicos disfrutan en un club de playa de una tarde de sol y bellezas

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Comienza la despedida de Mykonos por todo lo alto. Primera parada en un club de playa donde Elettra demuestra a Abraham que es algo posesiva. Tras una cena típica griega, bailes incluidos, terminan la noche de Mykonos en una discoteca

programme.title: La venganza de los ex: Caribe
programme.desc: Lua, la ex de Gabriel, llega a la playa. Gab y Angietta queman a JV, pero a Lua no le importa y los dos se enrollan mucho en una cita. Camila y Ortega rompen. La tablet les convoca a un Luau donde llega Julio, el ex novio de Mari A.

programme.title: Catfish Colombia
programme.desc: Hace un año Diana conoció en una red social a Juan Manuel, sin embargo, nunca se han visto, ni han hablado por videollamadas. El día en el que se iban a conocer en persona, Juan Manuel tuvo un accidente de tránsito y perdió la vida.

programme.title: Catfish Colombia
programme.desc: Alejandra tiene una relación en línea hace tres años con Andrés David. Ambos viven en la misma ciudad pero hasta el día de hoy no se han conocido en persona ni por videollamadas.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Ocho solteros llegan a una villa en Tulum dispuestos a conocerse y ligar en unas vacaciones únicas. Hay una fiesta de blanco y luego pasean en cuatrimotos hasta un cenote. Llega el primer ex y una pareja conoce la Master Suite.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Llega el segundo ex a la villa y de inmediato causa polémica. En la fiesta dorada, Montse se divierte con Alejandro. Norma y Sargento coquetean en la piscina, mientras que Alejandro se va de cita y trata de ligar con sus famosos masajes.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: The serenity of historic Roanoke Island is shattered when a retired career soldier attempts to prove his late brother’s death was not a hunting accident, but murder.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Working with a young Deputy Sheriff, Conrad McMasters, Matlock begins to pick away at the pattern of cover-ups, exposing information about a money-laundering scheme, local corruption, and a tightly-knit group of drug dealers.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: When Tony Morgan, a smooth-talking, seemingly perfect son, frames his mother for murder, no one even suspects his involvement. No one except Ben Matlock, who tries to prove the good boy isn’t so good after all.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Ben goes to Baltimore to help Julie defend her best friend's brother only to find that the prosecutor is Julie's ex-husband.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Ben Matlock uncovers plots within a plot when Noel Bishop, the wunderkind director of horror films, is accused of murdering motion picture star Catherine McKay as the cameras roll.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Ben Matlock has serious doubts about a code of ethics among con artists which is never supposed to include murder.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Ben Matlock accepts the most dangerous case of his career when he agrees to defend an inmate accused of murder – before a kangaroo court in a riot-torn prison.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Matlock must protect his own life while he’s in prison trying to defend his client. Meanwhile, Conrad tries to unravel the prison murder plot from outside the walls.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Ben Matlock is left with a lot of questions and no answers when his client, Drew Carey, bolts from the courtroom during a preliminary hearing for murder.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: A deathbed letter from an old friend puts the life of Ben Matlock in peril when he feels morally obligated to reopen a murder case more than three decades old.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: The senseless murder of a toy store owner not only clouds the Christmas spirit, but threatens an annual party and gifts of toys to local orphans.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: A philandering college professor is murdered in his classroom and Marcy Hansen is the prime suspect, having announced her pregnancy in an argument before witnesses.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Ben Matlock and Michelle Thomas are exposed to a quick course in trash television when a vicious talk show host, Don Galloway, humiliates three prominent women to boost his ratings.

programme.desc: A series of flashbacks to his younger days – and some painful persuasion by Robin – help Franky make the difficult decision to leave his friends and go to sea with the Straw Hats!

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Robin's cola care package helps spring her friends from an icy prison, and Luffy's bold words inspire a battered and beaten pirate to keep fighting!

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: To facilitate a lengthy list of necessary repairs, the crew visits an alien station with a super-computer that can fix anything. But the automated station's demands for payment seem too good to be true...until Mayweather is discovered dead.

programme.title: Fringe
programme.desc: While explaining Peter's otherworldly origins to Olivia, Walter flashes back to 1985 where Peter's mother (guest star ORLA BRADY) is introduced.

programme.desc: While Walter deals with some very upsetting news — he tells Olivia's niece, Ella (LILY PILBLAD), a fairy tale that includes musical performances by Olivia and Agent Broyles.
